channel.title: Dev on Mr Wilde
channel.description: Recent content in Dev on Mr Wilde

item.title: Alf - Your Little Bash Alias Friend
item.description: Alf — Your Little Bash Alias Friend Create aliases by using a config file. Create aliases for sub-commands (for example, g s for git status). Synchronize your aliases across hosts or users by uploading your config file to GitHub. Does not alter anything in your system except for creating the ~/.bash_aliases file, which is normally already sourced by your login process. Works with bash and zsh. github link
